title: Yao Apasu
compiled_truth: Yao Apasu is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-02 to 2002-01-28), Yao Apasu sent 7 and received 123 emails, totalling 130 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (3), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (3), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (3), [Marie Heard](people/marie-heard) (2), [Suzanne Adams](people/suzanne-adams) (1).
